manifests.describe: Switch all cross-repo deps between link: (local) and npm (CI/CD) mode
manifests.longDescription: Replaces all cross-repo @kb-labs/* dependencies across monorepos. Creates a backup before applying. Run pnpm install after switching.

flags.name: repos
flags.description: Comma-separated list of repos to scope (e.g. kb-labs-cli,kb-labs-core)

flags.name: ttl
flags.description: npm registry cache TTL in hours (default: 24)

examples: devlink switch --mode=npm # Switch to npm mode (CI/CD)
devlink switch --mode=local # Switch to local mode (development)
devlink switch --mode=local --dry-run # Preview changes without applying
devlink switch --mode=npm --repos=kb-labs-cli,kb-labs-core # Switch specific repos only

display.name: DevLink
display.description: Manage cross-repo link: ↔ npm dependencies for KB Labs monorepos.

commands.describe: Switch all cross-repo deps between link: (local) and npm (CI/CD) mode
commands.longDescription: Replaces all cross-repo @kb-labs/* dependencies across monorepos. Creates a backup before applying. Run pnpm install after switching.

flags.name: repos
flags.description: Comma-separated list of repos to scope (e.g. kb-labs-cli,kb-labs-core)

flags.name: ttl
flags.description: npm registry cache TTL in hours (default: 24)

examples: devlink switch --mode=npm # Switch to npm mode (CI/CD)
devlink switch --mode=local # Switch to local mode (development)
devlink switch --mode=local --dry-run # Preview changes without applying
devlink switch --mode=npm --repos=kb-labs-cli,kb-labs-core # Switch specific repos only

commands.describe: Show current state of cross-repo dependencies
commands.longDescription: Displays the current linking mode, counts of link: vs npm dependencies, and any discrepancies across all monorepos.

flags.name: verbose
flags.description: Show all dependencies, not just cross-repo

examples: devlink status --verbose # Verbose output with all deps
devlink status --json # JSON output for scripting

commands.describe: Preview what would change when switching mode
commands.longDescription: Shows all dependency changes that would be made without applying them. Useful for reviewing before running switch.

flags.name: mode
flags.description: Target mode to plan for (defaults to opposite of current)

flags.name: repos
flags.description: Comma-separated list of repos to scope

flags.name: ttl
flags.description: npm registry cache TTL in hours (default: 24)

examples: devlink plan --mode=local # Plan switch to local mode
devlink plan --mode=npm # Plan switch to npm mode
devlink plan --mode=npm --json # JSON output for scripting

commands.describe: Freeze current dependency state to lock file
commands.longDescription: Saves a snapshot of current dependency mode to .kb/devlink/lock.json. Use to record a stable known-good state.

commands.describe: Restore previous dependency state from last backup
commands.longDescription: Restores package.json files from the most recent backup created by switch. Run pnpm install after undoing.
Lists all available backups. Use --restore <id> to restore a specific backup.

flags.name: restore
flags.description: Restore a specific backup by ID

manifests.longDescription: Displays the current linking mode, counts of link: vs npm dependencies, and any discrepancies across all monorepos.

flags.name: verbose

examples: devlink status --verbose # Verbose output with all deps
devlink status --json # JSON output for scripting

manifests.longDescription: Unified agent command with multiple modes: execute (default) - run task immediately, plan - generate execution plan without running, edit - modify existing files, debug - analyze errors with trace context. Supports filesystem, search, shell, memory, and user interaction tools.

flags.name: mode
flags.description: Agent mode: execute (default), plan, edit, debug

flags.name: complexity
flags.description: Task complexity (for plan mode): simple, medium, complex

flags.name: execute
flags.description: After plan is approved, immediately execute it (use with --mode=plan --approve)

flags.name: dry-run
flags.description: Preview changes without applying (for edit mode)

flags.name: debug
flags.description: Enable debug mode: emit full prompts and responses as llm:debug events

flags.name: timeout
flags.description: Abort agent execution after this many seconds (exit code 124). No timeout by default.

flags.name: budget
flags.description: Override token budget (e.g. 300000 for heavy tasks). Overrides config value.

flags.name: json
flags.description: Output structured JSON result instead of human-readable output.

display.name: Agent System
display.description: Autonomous agent system with LLM tool calling, task orchestration, and tier escalation.

commands.longDescription: Unified agent command with multiple modes: execute (default) - run task immediately, plan - generate execution plan without running, edit - modify existing files, debug - analyze errors with trace context. Supports filesystem, search, shell, memory, and user interaction tools.

flags.name: mode
flags.description: Agent mode: execute (default), plan, edit, debug

flags.name: complexity
flags.description: Task complexity (for plan mode): simple, medium, complex

flags.name: execute
flags.description: After plan is approved, immediately execute it (use with --mode=plan --approve)

flags.name: dry-run
flags.description: Preview changes without applying (for edit mode)

flags.name: debug
flags.description: Enable debug mode: emit full prompts and responses as llm:debug events

flags.name: timeout
flags.description: Abort agent execution after this many seconds (exit code 124). No timeout by default.

flags.name: budget
flags.description: Override token budget (e.g. 300000 for heavy tasks). Overrides config value.

flags.name: json
flags.description: Output structured JSON result instead of human-readable output.

commands.describe: Show trace statistics with cost and performance metrics
commands.longDescription: Analyze trace file to show comprehensive statistics: iterations, LLM calls, token usage, tool usage, timing, and cost. Supports --json flag for AI agent consumption.

commands.describe: Filter trace events by type for debugging
commands.longDescription: Filter trace events by type (llm:call, tool:execution, error:captured, etc.). Use this to debug specific aspects of agent execution. Supports --json flag for programmatic access.

flags.name: type
flags.description: Event type to filter (llm:call, tool:execution, etc.)

commands.describe: View all events for a specific iteration
commands.longDescription: Show all trace events for a specific iteration number. Useful for debugging what happened in a particular loop iteration. Includes summary statistics and event timeline.

commands.describe: View what the LLM sees at each iteration — context window, truncations, responses
commands.longDescription: Shows the full context timeline for debugging agent behavior. For each LLM call: what messages are in the sliding window, what was truncated/dropped, and what the LLM responded with.

commands.describe: Quick diagnostic analysis — answers "what went wrong?" in one command
commands.longDescription: Comprehensive diagnostic report for agent execution. Analyzes errors, context window health (drops, truncations), tool failures, LLM reasoning text, loop detection, and quality indicators. One command to understand any agent issue.

commands.describe: Show quality control report for recent agent runs
commands.longDescription: Aggregates agent KPI telemetry from analytics buffer and shows quality, token usage, tool efficiency, drift, and regression alerts. Useful for continuous quality control and cost/performance monitoring.

commands.describe: Show file change history for agent sessions
commands.longDescription: View file changes made by agents during execution. Filter by session, file, or agent. Shows timestamps, operations, and change metadata.

commands.describe: Show diff for specific file change
commands.longDescription: Display line-by-line diff for a specific file change. Shows additions, deletions, and modifications with context.

flags.name: change-id
flags.description: Change ID to show diff for

commands.describe: Rollback file changes made by agents
commands.longDescription: Rollback file changes made by agents. Supports rollback by change ID, file path, agent ID, session, or timestamp. Use --dry-run to preview changes before applying.

flags.name: file
flags.description: File path to rollback all changes for

flags.name: agent-id
flags.description: Agent ID to rollback all changes by

flags.name: session-id
flags.description: Session ID to rollback all changes in

routes.description: Generate detailed spec from approved plan
List file changes for session (optionally filtered by runId)
Get unified diff for a specific file change
Rollback file changes for a session/run
Approve file changes for a session/run

channels.description: Persistent session stream (all runs in session)

artifacts.description: Persistent agent memory (facts, sessions, project context).

manifests.describe: Show trace statistics with cost and performance metrics
manifests.longDescription: Analyze trace file to show comprehensive statistics: iterations, LLM calls, token usage, tool usage, timing, and cost. Supports --json flag for AI agent consumption.

display.name: Commit Generator
display.description: AI-powered commit generation with conventional commit support.

commands.describe: Generate commit plan from git changes.
commands.longDescription: Analyzes staged and unstaged changes using git diff, then uses LLM to group related changes and generate conventional commit messages.

flags.name: scope

commands.describe: Apply current commit plan (create local commits).

manifests.longDescription: Analyzes code using heuristic engines (ESLint, Ruff, etc.) and optionally LLM analyzers. Supports three modes: heuristic (CI, fast), full (local, comprehensive), llm (deep analysis).
